name: Mamma Mary's Pasta e Fagioli
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, gently fry the garlic in the olive oil until golden brown.
2. Add the tomato sauce and water, and let cook for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the cannellini beans and continue to cook on simmer.
4. Cook the ditalini or elbow macaroni al dente, then drain and add it to the bean mixture.
5. Gently stir until combined. If the mixture becomes too thick, add a little more water.
6. Add chopped parsley. Serve immediately, or the pasta will absorb all the liquid.
7. Optionally, sprinkle with grated cheese and serve with Italian bread. The dish can also be enjoyed cold the next day or warmed up slightly by adding a little water.
Serves 4.
